body:
## Summary
- `cartTotal` in `src/cart.js` called `reduce` with no initial value, so an empty cart threw `Reduce of empty array with no initial value` and populated carts seeded the accumulator with the first item object (NaN/garbage total).
- Fixed by passing `0` as the initial accumulator: `items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.qty, 0)`.

Closes #1.

## Test plan
- `node test.js` → all 3 checks pass, exit 0:
  - `sums a populated cart` → 35
  - `single item cart` → 28
  - `empty cart totals to 0` → 0

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: fix(cart): seed cartTotal reduce with 0 to fix NaN on empty cart
